name: A hallway in the Last Homely House
description:
The ornate hallway guides you through the Last Homely House.  There are large
pictures hanging from the walls, painted in vibrant colors with superb
craftmanship.  Nature scenes, elvish maidens from ages past, and wild animals
come to life upon the canvas coverings.  Beneath your feet, your footsteps echo
softly on the wooden floor.
